lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਣਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਆ ਸੋਈ ਸਾਰ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak karanaa jin keea soee saar karee |
lines.english: O Nanak, the One who created the creation - He alone takes care of it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮਾ ਉਪਰਿ ਨਿਬੜੈ ਜੇ ਲੋਚੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: karamaa upar nibarrai je lochai sabh koe |3|
lines.english: According to the karma of past actions, one's destiny unfolds, even though everyone wants to be so lucky. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਬੈਰਾਗਣਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree bairaagan mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Gauree Bairaagan, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਣੀ ਹੋਵਾ ਬਨਿ ਬਸਾ ਕੰਦ ਮੂਲ ਚੁਣਿ ਖਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: haranee hovaa ban basaa kand mool chun khaau |
lines.english: What if I were to become a deer, and live in the forest, picking and eating fruits and roots

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਪੀ ਖਸਮ ਕਾ ਕਿਸੈ ਵਡਾਈ ਦੇਇ ॥੪॥੧॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: hukam na jaapee khasam kaa kisai vaddaaee dee |4|1|18|
lines.english: The Hukam of our Lord and Master's Command cannot be known; He Himself blesses us with greatness. ||4||1||18||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਬਨਜਾਰਨਿ ਰਾਮ ਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: mai banajaaran raam kee |
lines.english: I am the shop-keeper of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਹੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਾਰਿ ਵਾਰਿ ਹਉ ਜਾਉ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee meraa sahu milai vaar vaar hau jaau jeeo |1|
lines.english: - by Guru's Grace, I am a sacrifice to my Master. Again and again, I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਕਿਲ ਹੋਵਾ ਅੰਬਿ ਬਸਾ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਬਦ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kokil hovaa anb basaa sehaj sabad beechaar |
lines.english: If I were to become a cuckoo, living in a mango tree, I would still contemplate the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਰੁ ਵਾਪਾਰੁ ਜੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: teraa naam vakhar vaapaar jee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Your Name is my merchandise and trade. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਛੁਲੀ ਹੋਵਾ ਜਲਿ ਬਸਾ ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: machhulee hovaa jal basaa jeea jant sabh saar |
lines.english: If I were to become a fish, living in the water, I would still remember the Lord, who watches over all beings and creatures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਹੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਦਰਸਨਿ ਰੂਪਿ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sehaj subhaae meraa sahu milai darasan roop apaar |2|
lines.english: I would still meet my Lord and Master, with intuitive ease; the Darshan, the Blessed Vision of His Form, is incomparably beautiful. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਰਵਾਰਿ ਪਾਰਿ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਹੁ ਵਸੈ ਹਉ ਮਿਲਉਗੀ ਬਾਹ ਪਸਾਰਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: auravaar paar meraa sahu vasai hau milaugee baah pasaar |3|
lines.english: My Husband Lord dwells on this shore, and on the shore beyond; I would still meet Him, and hug Him close in my embrace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਗਨਿ ਹੋਵਾ ਧਰ ਵਸਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਵਸੈ ਭਉ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naagan hovaa dhar vasaa sabad vasai bhau jaae |
lines.english: If I were to become a snake, living in the ground, the Shabad would still dwell in my mind, and my fears would be dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦਾ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਜਿਨ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੪॥੨॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: naanak sadaa sohaaganee jin jotee jot samaae |4|2|19|
lines.english: O Nanak, they are forever the happy soul-brides, whose light merges into His Light. ||4||2||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਪੂਰਬੀ ਦੀਪਕੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree poorabee deepakee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Gauree Poorbee Deepkee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਸੋਹਿਲਾ ਸਿਵਰਹੁ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tit ghar gaavahu sohilaa sivarahu sirajanahaaro |1|
lines.english: - in that house, sing the Songs of Praise, and meditate in remembrance on the Creator Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈ ਘਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਆਖੀਐ ਕਰਤੇ ਕਾ ਹੋਇ ਬੀਚਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: jai ghar keerat aakheeai karate kaa hoe beechaaro |
lines.english: In that house where the Praises of the Creator are chanted

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਕਾ ਸੋਹਿਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: tum gaavahu mere nirbhau kaa sohilaa |
lines.english: Sing the Songs of Praise of my Fearless Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜਾਉ ਜਿਤੁ ਸੋਹਿਲੈ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jaau jit sohilai sadaa sukh hoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to that Song of Praise which brings eternal peace. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਜੀਅੜੇ ਸਮਾਲੀਅਨਿ ਦੇਖੈਗਾ ਦੇਵਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: nit nit jeearre samaaleean dekhaigaa devanahaar |
lines.english: Day after day, He cares for His beings; the Great Giver watches over all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਦਾਨੈ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਦਾਤੇ ਕਵਣੁ ਸੁਮਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tere daanai keemat naa pavai tis daate kavan sumaar |2|
lines.english: Your gifts cannot be appraised; how can anyone compare to the Giver? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹੁ ਸਜਣ ਆਸੀਸੜੀਆ ਜਿਉ ਹੋਵੈ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਸਿਉ ਮੇਲੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dehu sajan aaseesarreea jiau hovai saahib siau mel |3|
lines.english: My friends, give me your blessings, that I may merge with my Lord and Master. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਬਤਿ ਸਾਹਾ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਮਿਲਿ ਕਰਿ ਪਾਵਹੁ ਤੇਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: sanbat saahaa likhiaa mil kar paavahu tel |
lines.english: The day of my wedding is pre-ordained. Come - let's gather together and pour the oil over the threshold.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਏਹੋ ਪਾਹੁਚਾ ਸਦੜੇ ਨਿਤ ਪਵੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: ghar ghar eho paahuchaa sadarre nit pavan |
lines.english: Unto each and every home, into each and every heart, this summons is sent out; the call comes each and every day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਣਹਾਰਾ ਸਿਮਰੀਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇ ਦਿਹ ਆਵੰਨਿ ॥੪॥੧॥੨੦॥
lines.translit: sadanahaaraa simareeai naanak se dih aavan |4|1|20|
lines.english: Remember in meditation the One who summons us; O Nanak, that day is drawing near! ||4||1||20||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਗੁਆਰੇਰੀ ॥ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਚਉਪਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: raag gaurree guaareree | mahalaa 3 chaupade |
lines.english: Raag Gauree Gwaarayree: Third Mehl, Chau-Padhay:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: aape mel milaavai soee |
lines.english: He Himself unites us in His Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਲਾ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur miliai har melaa hoee |
lines.english: Meeting the Guru, we meet the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਭ ਬਿਧਿ ਆਪੇ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: meraa prabh sabh bidh aape jaanai |
lines.english: My God knows all His Own Ways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੇ ਮੇਲੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਣੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hukame mele sabad pachhaanai |1|
lines.english: By the Hukam of His Command, He unites those who recognize the Word of the Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਇ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kai bhe bhram bhau jaae |
lines.english: By the Fear of the True Guru, doubt and fear are dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਰਾਚੈ ਸਚ ਰੰਗਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhai raachai sach rang samaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Imbued with His Fear, we are absorbed in the Love of the True One. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur miliai har man vasai subhaae |
lines.english: Meeting the Guru, the Lord naturally dwells within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਭਾਰਾ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: meraa prabh bhaaraa keemat nahee paae |
lines.english: My God is Great and Almighty; His value cannot be estimated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਬਖਸੇ ਬਖਸਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: meraa prabh bakhase bakhasanahaar |2|
lines.english: My God is the Forgiver. I pray that He may forgive me. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਸਭ ਮਤਿ ਬੁਧਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur miliai sabh mat budh hoe |
lines.english: Meeting the Guru, all wisdom and understanding are obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਸਾਲਾਹੈ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabad saalaahai ant na paaraavaar |
lines.english: Through the Shabad, I praise Him; He has no end or limitations.
